en: This was all an unfortunate misunderstanding, Dr. Levine?
ko: 이건 불행한 오해였던 거죠, 레빈 박사? 네.

en: Yes. I fired Candace because of performance. That's all.
ko: 저는 성과 문제로 캔디스를 해고했습니다. 그게 전부입니다.
감사합니다, 박사님. 케리, 다른 질문 있나요?

en: Mr. Agos? When was the last time you had sex with your wife?
ko: 마지막으로 마사지 치료사와 성관계를 가진 게 언제인가요?

en: Come on, Cary. Relevance. A fine, upstanding doctor said he was happily married,
ko: 훌륭한 의사가 행복한 결혼생활을 하고 있다고 말했죠,

en: and that's why he didn't fire my client, because she was too pretty.
ko: 그래서 제 의뢰인을 해고하지 않았다고, 그녀가 너무 예쁘다고요.

en: I'm just examining the truth of his contention. Ah, this is pure harassment.
ko: 저는 그의 주장의 진실성을 검토하고 있습니다.

en: When was the last time you had sex with your massage therapist?
ko: 마지막으로 마사지 치료사와 성관계를 가진 게 언제인가요?

en: Okay, that's outrageous. Are you serious? Totally irrelevant to the case.
Beverly Jensen admitting you had sex on five separate occasions.
ko: 저는 베벌리 젠슨입니다. 다섯 번의 성관계를 인정합니다. 증언이 끝났습니다.

en: This deposition's over. Let's get the judge on the line. Dr. Levine has a patient,
so we're gonna need to delay this after all. You're the one who went to the judge
ko: 레빈 박사에게 환자가 있어, 결국 이건 연기해야 할 것 같습니다.

en: insisting the deposition could only be today!
ko: 당신이 판사에게 오늘만 증언할 수 있다고 주장한 거잖아요.

en: So let's get the judge on the line! But I don't think he's gonna be in a giving mood.
What do you want? I want to get out my aggressions and my anger by destroying your client.
